data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

content.text:
All 7 files have been written successfully. Here is a summary:

**Mobile app screens (under `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\`):**

1. **`(tabs)/offers/index.tsx`** -- Offers list screen with 4 filter tabs (all, active, used, expired). Uses `useCachedQuery` to fetch `campaign_redemptions` with campaign and merchant relations. Displays status badges, merchant names, descriptions, and expiry dates. Pull-to-refresh and skeleton loading states included.

2. **`(tabs)/offers/[offerId].tsx`** -- Offer detail screen with full-screen QR code via `OfferQRDisplay`. Activates `useBrightness` for screen brightness boost. Shows campaign details, merchant info, expiry/redemption dates in a metadata section, and step-by-step redemption instructions for active offers.

3. **`(tabs)/profile/index.tsx`** -- Profile main screen displaying user avatar (initial letter), full name, and email from `useAuth`. Contains a menu linking to scan history and notifications, app version info, and a logout button with confirmation dialog.

4. **`(tabs)/profile/history.tsx`** -- Scan history screen listing up to 50 scans ordered by most recent. Each row shows the merchant name, date/time formatted in French locale, and stamps or points earned. Pull-to-refresh and empty state included.

5. **`(tabs)/profile/notifications.tsx`** -- Notification settings with push permission status indicator from `usePush` context. Three toggle switches for offers, rewards, and reminder notification categories.

6. **`offer/[token].tsx`** -- Deep link offer page accessed via `astrolab://offer/{token}`. Fetches the offer by `redemption_token` instead of ID. Shows QR display with brightness boost, campaign details, and a "back to home" button for authenticated users. Handles not-found state gracefully.

**Shared package (under `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\packages\shared\src\queries\`):**

7. **`customer.ts`** -- Reusable customer query functions that accept a `SupabaseClient` parameter: `getCustomerCards`, `getCustomerCardById`, `getCustomerScans`, `getCustomerRewards` (with optional merchant filter), `getCustomerOffers`, and `getOfferByToken`. All return properly typed results using the shared types from `@astrolab/shared`.
